allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/hugeicons-react/package.json'\); console.log\('main:', pkg.main\); console.log\('module:', pkg.module\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(pkg.exports, null, 2\).slice\(0, 300\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const h = require\('./node_modules/hugeicons-react/dist/cjs/hugeicons-react.js'\); const keys = Object.keys\(h\); const wallet = keys.filter\(k => /wallet/i.test\(k\)\); const plus = keys.filter\(k => /plus/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,5\); const refresh = keys.filter\(k => /refresh/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,5\); console.log\('WALLET:', wallet.join\(', '\)\); console.log\('PLUS:', plus.join\(', '\)\); console.log\('REFRESH:', refresh.join\(', '\)\);")
